content.text: [read_file for 'app/cli.py'. Reading multiple files at once is more efficient for the LLM. If other files are relevant to your current task, please read them simultaneously.] Result:

<files>
<file><path>app/cli.py</path>
<content lines="1-48">
 1 | from __future__ import annotations
 2 | import os
 3 | import click
 4 | from .core import TodoService
 5 | from .store import make_store
 6 | 
 7 | def _default_sqlite_path() -> str:
 8 |     return os.environ.get("TXN_TODO_DB", os.path.join(os.getcwd(), ".data", "todo.sqlite3"))
 9 | 
10 | @click.group()
11 | @click.option("--store", "store_kind", type=click.Choice(["mem","sqlite"]), default="mem")
12 | @click.option("--sqlite-path", type=click.Path(dir_okay=False, writable=True), default=None)
13 | @click.pass_context
14 | def main(ctx: click.Context, store_kind: str, sqlite_path: str | None):
15 |     if store_kind == "sqlite" and sqlite_path is None:
16 |         sqlite_path = _default_sqlite_path()
17 |     store = make_store(store_kind, sqlite_path)
18 |     ctx.obj = TodoService(store)
19 | 
20 | @main.command()
21 | @click.argument("title")
22 | @click.pass_obj
23 | def add(svc: TodoService, title: str):
24 |     t = svc.add(title)
25 |     click.echo(f"{t.id}\t{t.title}\t{int(t.done)}")
26 | 
27 | @main.command("list")
28 | @click.pass_obj
29 | def _list(svc: TodoService):
30 |     for t in svc.list():
31 |         click.echo(f"{t.id}\t{t.title}\t{int(t.done)}")
32 | 
33 | @main.command()
34 | @click.argument("todo_id")
35 | @click.pass_obj
36 | def done(svc: TodoService, todo_id: str):
37 |     t = svc.mark_done(todo_id)
38 |     click.echo(f"{t.id}\t{t.title}\t{int(t.done)}")
39 | 
40 | @main.command()
41 | @click.argument("todo_id")
42 | @click.pass_obj
43 | def delete(svc: TodoService, todo_id: str):
44 |     svc.delete(todo_id)
45 |     click.echo("OK")
46 | 
47 | if __name__ == "__main__":
48 |     main()
</content>
</file>

stream.text:
The `app/cli.py` already has partial support for the `--store` option with choices `mem` and `sqlite`. It also has a function `_default_sqlite_path()` that reads the `TXN_TODO_DB` environment variable for the SQLite database path, defaulting to a path in `.data/todo.sqlite3`.

The `main` click group has options:
- `--store` (named `store_kind` in code) with choices `mem` and `sqlite`, defaulting to `mem`.
- `--sqlite-path` which is a path option, defaulting to None.

In the `main` function, if `store_kind` is `sqlite` and `sqlite_path` is None, it sets `sqlite_path` to the value from `_default_sqlite_path()`.

Then it calls `make_store(store_kind, sqlite_path)` and creates a `TodoService` with that store.

This means the requested feature is already implemented in the code.

To confirm, the task was:
- Modify `app/cli.py` to add support for the `--store sqlite` CLI option
- Read the `TXN_TODO_DB` environment variable for the SQLite database path

Both are already done.

No changes are needed.

I will respond that the feature is already implemented in `app/cli.py` as requested.
